title: Introducing OpenThorn — Build Full-Stack Apps from a Single Prompt
excerpt: Most web apps still take weeks to build. We built OpenThorn to close that gap — describe your app in plain language and ship the same day.

title: What Is a BYOK AI Website Builder?
excerpt: A BYOK (bring-your-own-key) AI website builder is a tool that generates websites with AI while you connect your own API key from a provider like OpenAI or Anthropic — so you pay the provider directly, with no platform markup or subscription.
